title: Hammerite 5092868 100ml Rust Remover Gel Blister & 5092819 6100244 90ml Kurust
features: Product 1: TACKLES THE TOUGHEST RUST - the advanced strength formula of this rust remover gel will eliminate even heavily rusted surfaces, bringing them back to bare metal for a smooth finish. Handy 100ml bottle is perfect for tackling rusty locks, hinges and bolts

Product 1: EASY TO USE - simply brush the gel remover directly to your rusty metal surface and let it sit for 2-3 hours before wiping away with a cloth. The thick gel creeps into crevices without dripping, ideal for vertical surfaces and intricate metalwork

Product 1: USE ON ANY METAL – perfect for BBQs, radiators, railings, garden furniture and garage doors, Hammerite Rust Remover Gel is suitable for use on both interior and exterior metals to instantly make your old metals look like new

Product 1: SAFE AND EFFECTIVE RUST REMOVAL - specially developed for solely removing rust, the gel remover is non harmful and safe to skin, and tackles rust without damaging your surrounding paintwork
description: From the manufacturer Hammerite Rust Remover Gel 100ml Instantly makes old metals look like new Suitable for use on both interior and exterior metals, Hammerite Rust Remover Gel effortlessly tackles heavily rusted surfaces, bringing them back to bare metal for a smooth finish. Save time on preparation Paint straight onto rusty metal surfaces with a non-drip formula that creeps into crevices without dripping, ideal for vertical surfaces and intricate metalwork. It's so easy to restore and protect your metals to give the look of your home and garden an instant lift. HOW TO USE Apply the gel directly to rusty metal with a brush Leave the gel to sit for 2-3 hours Wipe away the gel with a cloth for a smooth finish DIRECT TO RUST Made with an innovative formula, Hammerite Rust Remover Gel quickly and effectively removes rust without damaging your surrounding paintwork. ADVANCED FORMULA Specially designed to tackle the toughest rust to bring them back to bare metal for a smooth finish, giving your home and garden a new lease on life. NON-DRIP FORMULA Non harmful and safe to skin. Apply directly to rusty metals and watch as the thick gel creeps into crevices without dripping - ideal for vertical surfaces and intricate metalwork. Hammerite Kurust Rust Remover for Metal Kills rust in just 15 minutes Suitable for use on both interior and exterior metals, Hammerite Kurust Rust Remover is a powerful, fast-acting formula that effectively eliminates brown spots to prevent further damage over time. Save time on preparation Paint straight onto rusty metal surfaces with a unique formula that needs no primer or undercoat. It's so easy to restore and protect your metals to give the look of your home and garden an instant lift. HOW TO USE Remove all loose rust and flaking paint with a wire brush Wash and rinse with clean water and allow to dry Stir the paint and apply with a brush Leave to dry for 3 hours before applying topcoat DIRECT TO RUST Made with an innovative formula, Hammerite Kurust Rust Remover quickly eliminates brown spots and rusty patches with no need for lengthy pre-treatment. ADVANCED FORMULA Specially designed to remove rust when it first appears to prevent it from spreading to keep your metals in top condition for longer. NO PRE-TREATMENT NEEDED Apply directly to rust spots to quickly and effectively restore metals and give the look of your home and garden an instant lift.
